// About

The Engineer
Behind the Data

I'm a trilingual Senior Data Engineer passionate about building fast, reliable, and analytics-ready data infrastructure. From raw telecom datasets to fraud detection pipelines — I architect systems that scale and deliver.

Currently at Sofrecom (Orange Group), building Databricks lakehouse pipelines with dbt, Starburst, and Apache Iceberg across 17 countries. Every pipeline: Bronze to Gold, always production-grade, always observable.

I specialize in dimensional modeling, star schemas, and semantic layers that turn complex data into self-service analytics trusted by business teams.

Arabic — Native English — C1 French — Fluent German — Conversational

Where I've Built

Senior Data Engineer — Cloud & Data Platforms
Jan 2025 → Present
Sofrecom (Orange Group)
  • Developed Databricks lakehouse pipelines with PySpark, SQL, and dbt, processing multi-country telecom datasets across 17 countries
  • Built dbt transformation pipelines integrated with Starburst, transforming raw data into Bronze → Silver → Gold layers
  • Designed dimensional data models (fact/dimension tables, star schemas) for high-performance querying
  • Optimized Spark jobs and cluster configs — 30% improvement in processing time
  • Delivered curated data marts and semantic layers enabling self-service analytics
